ast.name: error
ast.source: This browser lacks typed array (Uint8Array) support which is required by `buffer` v5.x. Use `buffer` v4.x if you require old browser support.
ast.target: 此浏览器缺少`buffer` v5.x所需的类型化数组（Uint8Array）支持。如果您需要旧版浏览器支持，请使用`buffer` v4.x。

ast.name: error
ast.source: ACTION NEEDED: require('iconv-lite').extendNodeEncodings() is not supported in your version of Node

ast.name: error
ast.source: Iconv-lite warning: decode()-ing strings is deprecated. Refer to https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Use-Buffers-when-decoding
ast.target: Iconv-lite警告：decode()字符串已弃用。请参阅 https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Use-Buffers-when-decoding

ast.name: warn
ast.source: pdftion skipped annotation state without a PDF fingerprint.
ast.target: pdftion跳过了没有PDF指纹的注释状态。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: pdftion skipped annotation state for a replaced PDF.
ast.target: pdftion跳过了已替换PDF的注释状态。
